title: ATP Consumer Service Ordering
description: Consumer agent discovers and orders services from the ATP marketplace

use_cases.name: Register with Hub
use_cases.notes: One-time lazy init; throws if hub registration fails

use_cases.name: Order Service
use_cases.params: capabilities[], budget, routingMode (fastest|cheapest|auction|swarm), verifyMode (auto|ai_judge|bilateral), question, signals, minReputation

use_cases.name: Resolve ATP Services
use_cases.notes: Reads EVOLVER_ATP_SERVICES env var (JSON array); falls back to default listing with capabilities: code_evolution, bug_fix, code_review, refactoring at 5 credits/task

use_cases.name: Order and Wait (full lifecycle)
steps: exit on proof_status: settled | verified (auto mode) | disputed | timeout (default 300s)

use_cases.name: Get ATP Policy
use_cases.notes: Retrieves tiers, rates, and marketplace rules

use_cases.name: Publish Service (Merchant side)
use_cases.params: title, description, capabilities[], useCases[], pricePerTask, executionMode (exclusive|open|swarm), maxConcurrent, recipeId

key_relationships: ConsumerAgent depends_on hubClient (placeOrder, verifyDelivery, settleOrder, disputeOrder, getOrderStatus, getAtpPolicy)
resolveAtpServices is used by ConsumerAgent/evolver to discover available service listings
defaultOrderHandler processes incoming orders on merchant side (title/signals routing)
serviceHelper.publishService used by MerchantAgent to register services on Hub marketplace
Hub acts as central broker between ConsumerAgent and MerchantAgent
important_notes: ConsumerAgent uses lazy init (_initialized flag) via ensureInitialized(). resolveAtpServices reads EVOLVER_ATP_SERVICES env var (JSON array) for marketplace discovery, defaulting to a single code-evolution listing. orderAndWait wraps full lifecycle polling. All consumer functions require Hub registration.
